input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.3
            TITLE: driver gear

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3: Driver Gear
VE.3.3 Driver Gear 
The driver must wear the following:

RULE: ve.3.3.5
            TITLE: shoes

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.5: Shoes
VE.3.3.5 Shoes  
Shoes or boots made from Flame Resistant Material that meet an approved standard and 
labeled as such: 
• SFI Spec 3.3 
• FIA Standard 8856-2000  
• FIA Standard 8856-2018

RULE: ve.3.3.3
            TITLE: balaclava

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.3: Balaclava
VE.3.3.3 Balaclava 
A Balaclava (head sock) which covers the driver’s head, hair and neck, made from Flame 
Resistant Material

RULE: ve.3.3.4
            TITLE: socks

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.4: Socks
VE.3.3.4 Socks 
Socks made from Flame Resistant Material that cover the bare skin between the driver’s suit 
and the Shoes.

RULE: ve.3.3.1
            TITLE: driver suit

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.1: Driver Suit
VE.3.3.1 Driver Suit 
A one piece suit, made from a minimum of two layers of Flame Resistant Material that covers 
the body from the neck to the ankles and the wrists.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 77 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
Each suit must meet one or more of the following standards and be labeled as such: 
• SFI 3.2A/5 (or higher ex:  /10, /15, /20) 
• SFI 3.4/5 (or higher ex:  /10, /15, /20) 
• FIA Standard 1986 
• FIA Standard 8856-2000 
• FIA Standard 8856-2018

final_answer: Driver Gear VE.3.3 Driver Gear The driver must wear the following:
